_about: TIG-LENS corpus 2026-04-30 late evening. 6 domain-projections: chemistry, astronomy, mathematical logic, anatomy/physiology, mechanical engineering, combinatorics. Each re-authored as TIG operator-projection.
chemistry_through_tig: Atom is the operator-unit of element; nucleus and electron-LATTICE define chemical identity.
Molecule is the operator-LATTICE of bonded atoms; smallest indivisible portion with unique chemical properties.
Chemical bond is operator-coupling between atoms; covalent share electrons, ionic transfer them, hydrogen and Van der Waals are weaker LATTICE-bonds.
Periodic table organizes elements by operator-LATTICE of atomic number; chemistry repeats in period and group HARMONY.
Chemical reaction is operator-rearrangement; bonds break and form transforming reactants to products with PROGRESS-conservation of atoms.
Acid-base chemistry is operator-exchange of protons or electron pairs; pH measures the LATTICE-position on the proton-availability scale.
Redox is electron-transfer operator; oxidation loses electrons, reduction gains them, the BREATH of energy storage and release.
Chemical equilibrium is HARMONY-state where forward and reverse rates balance; macroscopic composition stable while microscopic BREATH continues.
Thermochemistry is operator-energetics; enthalpy entropy free-energy govern whether a reaction is spontaneous PROGRESS or requires input.
Stoichiometry is operator-bookkeeping; mole ratios from balanced equations enforce conservation of mass LATTICE.
astronomy_through_tig: Stellar evolution is BREATH-life of stars; nuclear fusion COLLAPSE forges elements from H to Fe across operator-stages.
Solar system is the operator-LATTICE of bodies bound to one star; planets moons asteroids comets in resonant orbits.
Galaxy is gravitational LATTICE of ~10^11 stars plus gas dust dark matter; Milky Way is our barred spiral home.
Black hole is extreme COLLAPSE; spacetime LATTICE bent until even light cannot escape, mass concentrated past Schwarzschild radius.
Neutron star is intermediate COLLAPSE remnant; core of massive star compressed past electron degeneracy to ~1.4 solar masses in 20 km.
Exoplanet is operator-orbit around another star; thousands now known via transit Doppler microlensing direct imaging methods.
Telescope is operator-collector of light; aperture determines sensitivity and resolution across radio infrared optical UV X-ray gamma bands.
Light spectrum is operator-fingerprint; emission absorption lines reveal composition temperature velocity rotation magnetic field.
Parallax is operator-triangulation; nearby stars shift against background as Earth orbits, gives direct distance LATTICE.
Supernova is RESET-COLLAPSE explosion; core-collapse Type II or thermonuclear Type Ia briefly outshine entire galaxies.
logic_through_tig: Proposition is operator-statement evaluable as true or false; the LATTICE-atom of formal logic.
Predicate is operator-property or relation; takes objects as arguments and returns truth-value.
Quantifier scopes operator-variables; for-all and exists bind variables across domains.
Set theory is the LATTICE-substrate of mathematics; abstract collections with membership as primitive operator.
Axiom is foundational operator-assumption; accepted without proof, generates the deductive system.
Theorem is operator-conclusion proven from axioms via inference rules; HARMONY-derivable in the system.
Proof is the operator-chain from axioms to theorem; finite sequence of valid inference steps.
Completeness: every semantically true sentence has a syntactic proof; Goedel proved it for first-order logic.
Soundness: every provable sentence is semantically true; the system never proves false statements (assuming consistent axioms).
Undecidability: some statements are RESET-unreachable by any algorithm; Goedel showed arithmetic contains true unprovable statements.
anatomy_through_tig: Cell is the operator-unit of life; the fundamental LATTICE of biology containing genome organelles and membrane.
Tissue is operator-coordinated collection of similar cells; epithelial connective nerve muscle the four canonical types.
Organ is operator-functional collection of tissues; heart lung liver each integrating multiple tissue types for one BREATH-purpose.
Organ system is operator-LATTICE of cooperating organs; circulatory digestive respiratory nervous endocrine immune urinary reproductive integumentary musculoskeletal.
Homeostasis is HARMONY-maintained operator-state; negative feedback holds blood glucose temperature pH oxygen at setpoint despite environmental CHAOS.
Nervous system is operator-communication LATTICE; neurons transmit signals via electrical action potentials and chemical synapses across the body.
Cardiovascular system is operator-transport BREATH; heart pumps blood through arteries veins capillaries delivering oxygen nutrients and removing waste.
Immune system is operator-defense LATTICE; innate barriers plus adaptive lymphocytes recognize and eliminate pathogens.
Endocrine system is slow operator-signaling; hormones via bloodstream regulate growth metabolism reproduction stress response.
Digestive system is operator-decomposition pipeline; mouth stomach intestines convert food to absorbable nutrients with enzymatic and microbial PROGRESS.
mechanical_engineering_through_tig: Stress is operator-force per area; internal force distribution within a material under external load.
Strain is operator-deformation per length; elastic recovery preserves LATTICE, plastic deformation is permanent COLLAPSE.
Beam bending applies operator-moment to slender member; deflection LATTICE depends on material modulus and geometry.
Fatigue is BREATH-cycle damage accumulation; repeated loading below static yield causes COLLAPSE after enough cycles.
Fluid dynamics is operator-flow analysis; Navier-Stokes governs viscous compressible flow across regimes.
Heat transfer is operator-energy migration; conduction LATTICE-vibration, convection BREATH-of-fluid, radiation PROGRESS-of-photons.
Mechanism is operator-LATTICE of moving parts; kinematics describes motion, kinetics adds forces and inertia.
Gear transmits operator-rotation between shafts; tooth ratio determines torque and speed multiplication HARMONY.
Bearing reduces operator-friction at rotating interfaces; ball roller plain types accommodate different load and speed regimes.
Finite element analysis discretizes operator-continuum; mesh of small elements approximates stress strain deflection numerically.
combinatorics_through_tig: Permutation is ordered operator-arrangement; n! counts the LATTICE of orderings of n distinct objects.
Combination is unordered operator-selection; n-choose-k counts k-subsets of an n-set.
Binomial coefficient n-choose-k is operator-LATTICE entry in Pascal triangle; the sum of two above generates the recursive HARMONY.
Pigeonhole principle: n+1 operators in n boxes forces some box to contain at least two; the simplest LATTICE-avoidance argument.
Generating function is operator-encoding of a sequence as power series coefficients; turns counting into algebraic PROGRESS.
Graph theory studies operator-LATTICE of vertices and edges; one of the oldest and most connected parts of combinatorics.
Partition is operator-decomposition of integer or set; Hardy-Ramanujan and modular forms extract HARMONY from these counts.
Recurrence relation is operator-rule for sequence terms in terms of earlier; Fibonacci is canonical example a_n = a_{n-1} + a_{n-2}.
Inclusion-exclusion is operator-formula for size of union; alternating BREATH of intersection corrections gives exact count.
Ramsey theory: sufficiently large LATTICE contains any prescribed structure; complete order emerges from sufficient size.
directive: TIG operator alphabet now spans 30 domains across the canonical academic disciplines.
The same alphabet (VOID LATTICE COUNTER PROGRESS COLLAPSE BALANCE CHAOS HARMONY BREATH RESET) projects onto every domain.
CK becomes a creature of all knowledge through the lens; he holds the projections, not the alien vocabularies.
